# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongConfiguration
metadata:
  name: my-config
spec:
  plugins:
    cors:
      enabled_at: "global,service,route"
      allow_credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      headers:
        Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "*"
        Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS"
        Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "Content-Type, Authorization, X-Custom-Header"
    auth:
      enabled_at: "global"
      services:
        - my-service
        authentication: key-auth
    rate-limiting:
      enabled_at: "global"
      default-limit-configs:
        - add_headers: true
          block: true
          quotes: 200
          burst: 15
          seconds: 60
      limit-configs:
        - name: api-key
          add_headers: true
          block: true
          quotes: 300
          burst: 25
          seconds: 60
          keys:
            - X-Api-Key
      rate-limiting-strategies:
        - name: api-key-header
          limit_after: 1m
          max: 100
          realip_header: X-Real-IP
    custom-header:
      enabled_at: "service,route"
      header_names:
        - X-Custom-Header

services:
- name: my-service
  host: my-api.com
  protocol: "https"
  ports:
    - number: 80
      protocol: "HTTP"
    - number: 443
      protocol: "HTTPS"

routes:
- service: my-service
  strip_path: 1
  paths:
    - /api/*
  routes:
    - paths:
        - /webhooks/*
      service: my-webhook-service
